arts.ttl: Chelsea beating Barrow shows we're a 'serious team', claims €45m star
arts.sum: The defender said that now the club are "a serious team", with the Italian head coach's tactics and training methods changing their fortunes around. "Sometimes when you play against a lower league team you can become a little bit distracted, but the coach said that we have to stay serious and show everyone that Chelsea are a serious team that wants to win every game."
